title: Bug Hunt Remaining FIX-09 and FIX-10 Execution
consumer_purpose: Complete remaining P2/P3 bug hunt fixes — plugin tool name collision guard and coordination claim TTL
claim_atoms: PLUGIN_TOOL_COLLISION_SAFE: Plugin tools cannot silently shadow built-in tool names; COORDINATION_CLAIM_TTL: Coordination claims have expires_at column with auto-release on stale read
content:
# Bug Hunt Phase 3 — Execution Plan

## FIX-09 (P2): Plugin tool name collision guard
- **File**: packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
- **Seams**: Two registration paths at lines ~367-376 (filesystem tools) and ~378-392 (installed plugins)
- **Fix**: 
  1. Define a BUILTIN_TOOL_IDS set at top of state factory function (all keys from the Effect.all({...}) at lines ~397-501)
  2. In both registration loops, check if plugin tool ID collides with builtin set
  3. On collision: log warning and prefix with `plugin_` to avoid silent shadowing
- **Verification**: `bun run typecheck` from packages/opencode

## FIX-10 (P3): Coordination claim TTL
- **File**: packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts
- **Seams**: CoordinationClaimTable (line 54-66), claimTask (line 204-277), getClaim (line 357-367), getSessionClaims (line 369-378)
- **Fix**:
  1. Add `expires_at: integer()` column to CoordinationClaimTable
  2. In claimTask: set expires_at = Date.now() + 30_MINUTES on insert/upsert
  3. In getClaim/getSessionClaims: add stale check — if claim.expires_at < Date.now() and status === "claimed", auto-release
  4. The reservation staleness pattern already exists (300_000ms at line 448) — reuse same pattern
- **Verification**: `bun run typecheck` from packages/opencode

## Order
Both fixes are independent (different files, zero contention). Execute in parallel.
